signals.raw:
Ethereum Price Surge Above $2,200 on U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Announcement | YES | HIGH confidence** [3]

Ethereum's price has risen +3.43% in the last 24 hours to $2,395.42, explicitly linked to a U.S.-Iran ceasefire announcement boosting market sentiment, alongside record $500M+ net inflows into spot Ether ETFs this week[3]. This follows a $98.74 daily gain confirmed at 9:15 a.m. ET on April 22 to $2
